overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, beginning in a foggy neon-lit street at night and transitioning to a clear elevated walkway at dusk. The player character walks through a commercial district with prominent holographic advertisements and neon signage, eventually ascending stairs to an upper level.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy neon-lit commercial sidewalk under overhang

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the foggy sidewalk, passing neon storefronts on the left

entered.detail: large red neon sign atop a multi-story building visible through the fog
bright pink neon sign for Lizzie's establishment
green metal railing running along the right side of the walkway
low-rise building with yellow facade and garage door
tall palm trees lining the street visible through the fog

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy neon-lit street at night, walking along a covered sidewalk. The Hometown Deli sign glows red in the distance through the haze, while bright pink neon signs illuminate the left side of the street. Palm trees are visible as dark silhouettes in the fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy urban intersection with pedestrian crosswalk

events.description: waiting at the intersection corner as vehicles pass through the fog
begins crossing the wide yellow-striped crosswalk

agents.ego_description: waiting at the corner then crossing the street, navigating through moderate pedestrian traffic

notable_agents.action: green compact car driving across the intersection through the fog
person in red hoodie and white shorts waiting at the street corner

entered.detail: broad pedestrian crossing with thick yellow stripes
large cyan neon sign reading 'softsys' on a building facade
holographic billboard advertising a hotel with purple and pink graphics
standard traffic signal pole at the intersection corner

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a wide foggy intersection with a prominent yellow crosswalk. The camera waits at the corner as a green car passes, then begins crossing the street. The Hometown Deli sign moves to the left while new neon signs including 'softsys' and a large hotel billboard become visible ahead through the mist.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor staircase ascending to elevated walkway

events.description: fog dissipates revealing clear dusk sky with visible blue gradient
reaches the top of the stairs entering the elevated plaza level

agents.ego_description: climbing the wide yellow-railed staircase to the upper level, passing other pedestrians

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with bright yellow painted side walls and railings
clear dusk sky visible as the fog clears, showing deep blue color
concrete benches on the upper plaza level
yellow and blue recycling bins lined up on the plaza

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends a prominent yellow-walled staircase as the weather dramatically clears from foggy to clear dusk. At the top, the scene opens onto a concrete plaza with benches and trash bins. The hotel hologram and softsys sign remain visible but shift position as the elevation changes.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated commercial walkway with neon storefronts at dusk

events.description: passing the Brooklyn Barista neon sign entering the main elevated corridor

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated walkway, passing pedestrians and neon storefronts in the clear evening air

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking ahead along the elevated path

entered.detail: large red neon sign reading 'Brooklyn Barista' on the building facade
cyan neon sign for 'Dr. Hwang' medical establishment
tall cylindrical building covered in holographic advertisements
high-rise building with red neon accent lighting

segments.scene_description: The final segment takes place on a wide elevated walkway under a clear dusk sky. The camera passes prominent neon signs including 'Brooklyn Barista' and 'Dr. Hwang' while walking toward a distant cylindrical building covered in holographic ads. The fog has completely cleared, revealing the full cyberpunk cityscape with various pedestrians sharing the walkway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a foggy, neon-lit commercial district that gradually ascends into a clear, elevated cityscape at dusk. It begins on a covered sidewalk where red and pink neon signs glow through a dense haze, with palm trees appearing as dark silhouettes against the mist. As the camera moves forward, it pauses at a wide intersection with a yellow crosswalk before crossing the street toward a large hotel billboard and softsys signage. The scene then shifts as the camera ascends a yellow-walled staircase, causing the weather to dramatically clear from thick fog to a crisp dusk sky that opens onto a concrete plaza. Finally, the camera glides along a wide elevated walkway past the Brooklyn Barista and Dr. Hwang signs, revealing a vast urban horizon dominated by a distant cylindrical building covered in holographic advertisements.
